human_review_items.summary: Instruction still names four output-contract clauses (every MultiPolygon, keep earliest record_seq, drop <1 m2 fragments, no duplicates). Author already did two strip rounds (64740d0, ca8994d); current state appears intentional. Borderline whether further stripping is warranted.

task.json, metadata.yaml, and inventory.md tag data_scale as `medium` but the actual hand-crafted fixture has 290 input / 210 output features (~10^2), which the vocabulary calls `small`. coverage.yaml records the truthful `small`. Resolving requires retagging inventory.md (outside the task dir) or enlarging the fixture (touches inputs/), both out of unilateral scope.
